prompt: Verify an unsupported train-query task becomes a deduped Capability Gap instead of an ad-hoc builtin tool requirement.
Verify low-risk public weather data exploration can run automatically and persist bounded exploration evidence.
Verify high-risk exploration boundaries require explicit approval before execution.
Verify tasks needing host file access become Workspace Connector recommendations, not broad workspace scans.
Verify browser automation and external-write needs become approval-gated Browser Automation recommendations.
Verify activation approval is forbidden before verification and then binds the verified snapshot hash.
Verify secondary target failure records partial activation and rollback compensates active targets.
Verify self-modification becomes a development patch proposal handoff, never a runtime activation target.
Verify disabled acquisition mode does not break normal Agent/file/code-as-action surfaces or enqueue acquisition records.
Verify planner misses of existing tools become RuntimePlanningIssue records instead of Acquisition Gaps.
